Abbreviation.abbreviatedText.defn: The literal value of an instance of unstructured text that is used as the abbreviation.

Abbreviation.expandedText.defn: The full literal representation of the abbreviation.

Activity.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study activity.

Activity.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study activity.

Activity.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study activity.

Address.city.defn: A relatively large and/or densely populated area of human habitation with administrative or legal status that may be specified as a component of a postal address.

Address.district.defn: An administrative or territorial division of a city, town, county, parish, state, country, or other locality based on a shared characteristic.

Address.lines.defn: The street name and number, building number, apartment or unit number, or post office box number where an entity is physically located.

Address.postalCode.defn: An alphanumeric code assigned to a mail delivery area.

Address.state.defn: A sub-division of a country that forms part of a federal union. States are usually, but not always, more autonomous than provinces and may have different laws from the central government.

Address.text.defn: A standardized representation of the complete set of components denoting the physical address of the person, business, building, or organization.

AdministrableProduct.description.defn: A narrative representation of the administrable product.

AdministrableProduct.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the administrable product.

AdministrableProduct.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the administrable product.

AdministrableProductIdentifier.text.defn: An instance of structured text that represents the administrable product.

AdministrableProductProperty.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the administrable product property.

AdministrableProductProperty.text.defn: An instance of structured text that represents the administrable product property.

Administration.description.defn: A narrative representation for the administration of a product, agent, or therapy.

Administration.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the administration of a product, agent, or therapy.

Administration.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) for the administration of a product, agent, or therapy.

AnalysisPopulation.description.defn: A narrative representation of the analysis population.

AnalysisPopulation.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the analysis population.

AnalysisPopulation.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the analysis population.

AnalysisPopulation.text.defn: An instance of unstructured text that represents the analysis population.

AssignedPerson.description.defn: A narrative representation of the assigned person.

AssignedPerson.jobTitle.defn: An identifying designation related to the assigned person's occupation.

AssignedPerson.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the assigned person.

AssignedPerson.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the assigned person.

BiomedicalConcept.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the biomedical concept.

BiomedicalConcept.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the biomedical concept.

BiomedicalConcept.reference.defn: A citation to an authoritative source for a biomedical concept.

BiomedicalConcept.synonyms.defn: A word or an expression that serves as a figurative, symbolic, or exact substitute for a biomedical concept, and which has the same meaning.

BiomedicalConceptCategory.description.defn: A narrative representation of the biomedical concept category.

BiomedicalConceptCategory.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the biomedical concept category.

BiomedicalConceptCategory.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the biomedical concept category.

BiomedicalConceptProperty.datatype.defn: The structural format of the biomedical concept property response value. The datatype is carried in the attribute and influences the set of allowable values the attribute may assume. (After HL7)
BiomedicalConceptProperty.datatype.pref: Biomedical Concept Property Response Data Type

BiomedicalConceptProperty.isEnabled.defn: An indication as to whether the biomedical concept property is activated for use within a given usage context for a biomedical concept.

BiomedicalConceptProperty.isRequired.defn: An indication as to whether the biomedical concept property is required.

BiomedicalConceptProperty.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the biomedical concept property.

BiomedicalConceptProperty.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the biomedical concept property.

BiomedicalConceptSurrogate.description.defn: A narrative representation of the biomedical concept surrogate.

BiomedicalConceptSurrogate.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the biomedical concept surrogate.

BiomedicalConceptSurrogate.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the biomedical concept surrogate.

BiomedicalConceptSurrogate.reference.defn: A citation to an authoritative source for a biomedical concept surrogate.

BiospecimenRetention.description.defn: A narrative representation of the biospecimen retention.

BiospecimenRetention.includesDNA.defn: An indication as to whether retained biospecimens contain DNA.

BiospecimenRetention.isRetained.defn: An indication as to whether biospecimens were retained.

BiospecimenRetention.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the biospecimen retention.

BiospecimenRetention.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the biospecimen retention.

Characteristic.description.defn: A narrative representation of the characteristic.

Characteristic.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the characteristic.

Characteristic.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the characteristic.

Characteristic.text.defn: An instance of structured text that represents the characteristic.

Code.code.defn: The literal value of a code.

Code.codeSystem.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the system used to assign and/or manage codes.

Code.codeSystemVersion.defn: The version of the code system.

Code.decode.defn: Standardized or dictionary-derived human readable text associated with a code.

CommentAnnotation.text.defn: An instance of unstructured text that represents the comment annotation.

Condition.description.defn: A narrative representation of the condition.

Condition.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the condition.

Condition.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the condition.

Condition.text.defn: An instance of structured text that represents the condition.

ConditionAssignment.condition.defn: An assumption on which rests the validity or effect of something else.

DocumentContentReference.sectionNumber.defn: The numeric identifier of a particular section for the document content reference.

DocumentContentReference.sectionTitle.defn: An identifying designation for a particular section for the document content reference.

Duration.durationWillVary.defn: An indication as to whether the event duration is planned to vary within and/or across subjects.

Duration.reasonDurationWillVary.defn: The explanation for why the event duration will vary within and/or across subjects.

Duration.text.defn: An instance of unstructured text that represents the event duration.

EligibilityCriterion.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study eligibility criterion.

EligibilityCriterion.identifier.defn: A sequence of characters used to identify, name, or characterize the inclusion or exclusion criterion.

EligibilityCriterion.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study eligibility criterion.

EligibilityCriterion.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study eligibility criterion.

EligibilityCriterionItem.description.defn: A narrative representation of the eligibility criterion item.

EligibilityCriterionItem.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the eligibility criterion item.

EligibilityCriterionItem.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the eligibility criterion item.

EligibilityCriterionItem.text.defn: An instance of structured text that represents the eligibility criterion item.

Encounter.description.defn: A narrative representation of the protocol-defined study encounter.

Encounter.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study encounter.

Encounter.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) for a protocol-defined study encounter.

Endpoint.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study endpoint.

Endpoint.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study endpoint.

Endpoint.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study endpoint.

Endpoint.purpose.defn: The textual representation of the study endpoint purpose.

Endpoint.text.defn: An instance of structured text that represents the study endpoint.

Estimand.description.defn: A narrative representation of the estimand.

Estimand.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the estimand.

Estimand.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the estimand.

Estimand.populationSummary.defn: A synopsis of the clinical endpoint of interest within the analysis target study population.

GovernanceDate.dateValue.defn: The information contained in the date field.

GovernanceDate.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study governance date.

GovernanceDate.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study governance date.

GovernanceDate.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study governance date

Identifier.text.defn: An instance of structured text that represents the identifier.

Indication.description.defn: A narrative representation of the condition, disease or disorder that the clinical trial is intended to investigate or address.

Indication.isRareDisease.defn: An indication as to whether the disease/condition indication under study is considered a rare disease.
Indication.isRareDisease.pref: Disease/Condition Indication Is Rare Disease Indicator

Indication.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the disease/condition indication.

Indication.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the disease/condition indication.

IntercurrentEvent.description.defn: A narrative representation of the intercurrent event.

IntercurrentEvent.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the intercurrent event.

IntercurrentEvent.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the intercurrent event.

IntercurrentEvent.strategy.defn: A textual description of the planned strategy to manage and/or mitigate intercurrent events.

IntercurrentEvent.text.defn: An instance of structured text that represents the intercurrent event.

InterventionalStudyDesign.description.defn: A narrative representation of the interventional study design.

InterventionalStudyDesign.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the interventional study design.

InterventionalStudyDesign.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the interventional study design.

InterventionalStudyDesign.rationale.defn: Reason(s) for choosing the interventional study design. This may include reasons for the choice of control or comparator, as well as the scientific rationale for the study design.

Masking.isMasked.defn: An indication as to whether the study role is masked.

Masking.text.defn: An instance of unstructured text that represents how the masking is performed and maintained.

MedicalDevice.description.defn: A narrative representation of the medical device.

MedicalDevice.hardwareVersion.defn: A form or variant of hardware; one of a sequence of copies of the physical components from which a computer is constructed, each incorporating new modifications.

MedicalDevice.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the medical device.

MedicalDevice.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the medical device.

MedicalDevice.softwareVersion.defn: A form or variant of software; one of a sequence of copies of a software program, each incorporating new modifications. (NCI)

MedicalDeviceIdentifier.text.defn: An instance of structured text that represents the medical device identifier.

NarrativeContent.displaySectionNumber.defn: An indication as to whether the section number is to be displayed in the document containing narrative content.
NarrativeContent.displaySectionNumber.pref: Narrative Content Section Number Display Indicator

NarrativeContent.displaySectionTitle.defn: An indication as to whether the section title is to be displayed in the document containing narrative content.
NarrativeContent.displaySectionTitle.pref: Narrative Content Section Title Display Indicator

NarrativeContent.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the narrative content.

NarrativeContent.sectionNumber.defn: The numeric identifier assigned to a particular document section containing narrative content.

NarrativeContent.sectionTitle.defn: An identifying designation for the document section containing narrative content.

NarrativeContentItem.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the narrative content item.

NarrativeContentItem.text.defn: An instance of unstructured text that represents the narrative content item.

Objective.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study objective. (BRIDG)

Objective.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study objective.

Objective.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study objective.

Objective.text.defn: An instance of structured text that represents the study objective.

ObservationalStudyDesign.description.defn: A narrative representation of the observational study design.

ObservationalStudyDesign.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the observational study design.

ObservationalStudyDesign.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the observational study design.

ObservationalStudyDesign.rationale.defn: Reason(s) for choosing the observational study design. This may include reasons for the choice of control or comparator, as well as the scientific rationale for the study design.

Organization.identifier.defn: A unique symbol that establishes identity of the organization. (BRIDG)

Organization.identifierScheme.defn: The name of the organization that provides the identifier for the entity.

Organization.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the organization.

Organization.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the organization.

ParameterMap.reference.defn: The reference for a tag used in programming languages, such as a markup language (e.g., HTML, XML), to store attributes and elements.

ParameterMap.tag.defn: Character strings bounded by angle brackets that act as containers for programming language elements.

PersonName.familyName.defn: A word or group of words indicating a person's last (family) name.

PersonName.givenNames.defn: A word or group of words indicating a person's first (personal or given) name; the name that precedes the surname.

PersonName.prefixes.defn: An affix occurring at the start of the person name string, usually denoting a title or honorific.

PersonName.suffixes.defn: An affix occurring at the end of the person name, usually denoting educational or professional degrees and certifications, and/or filial rank.

PersonName.text.defn: An instance of structured text that represents the person's full name.

PopulationDefinition.description.defn: A narrative representation of the population definition.

PopulationDefinition.includesHealthySubj.defn: An indication as to whether the population definition includes healthy subjects, that is, subjects without the disease or condition under study.
PopulationDefinition.includesHealthySubj.pref: Population Definition Includes Healthy Subjects Indicator

PopulationDefinition.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the population definition.

PopulationDefinition.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the population definition.

Procedure.description.defn: A narrative representation of the procedure.

Procedure.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the procedure.

Procedure.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the procedure.

Procedure.procedureType.defn: A characterization or classification of the study procedure.

ProductOrganizationRole.description.defn: A narrative representation of the product organization role.

ProductOrganizationRole.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the product organization role.

ProductOrganizationRole.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the product organization role.

Quantity.value.defn: A numerical quantity measured or assigned or computed.

Range.isApproximate.defn: An indication as to whether the value range is almost, but not quite, exact.

ReferenceIdentifier.text.defn: An instance of structured text that represents the reference identifier.

ResponseCode.isEnabled.defn: An indication as to whether the response code is activated for use within a given usage context.

ResponseCode.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the response code.

ResponseCode.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the response code.

ScheduleTimeline.description.defn: A narrative representation of the schedule timeline.

ScheduleTimeline.entryCondition.defn: A logical evaluation on which rests the validity of entry into a schedule timeline.

ScheduleTimeline.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the schedule timeline.

ScheduleTimeline.mainTimeline.defn: An indication as to whether the timeline or timeline component is part of the central or principal timeline.

ScheduleTimeline.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the schedule timeline.

ScheduledActivityInstance.description.defn: A narrative representation of the scheduled activity instance.

ScheduledActivityInstance.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the scheduled activity instance.

ScheduledActivityInstance.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the scheduled activity instance.

ScheduledDecisionInstance.description.defn: A narrative representation of the scheduled Decision instance.

ScheduledDecisionInstance.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the scheduled Decision instance.

ScheduledDecisionInstance.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the scheduled Decision instance.

ScheduledInstance.description.defn: A narrative representation of the scheduled instance.

ScheduledInstance.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the scheduled instance.

ScheduledInstance.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the scheduled instance.

Strength.description.defn: A narrative representation of the substance strength.

Strength.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the substance strength.

Strength.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the substance strength.

Study.description.defn: A narrative representation of the clinical study.

Study.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the clinical study.

Study.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the clinical study.

StudyAmendment.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study amendment.

StudyAmendment.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study amendment.

StudyAmendment.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study amendment.

StudyAmendment.number.defn: A string of numerals that uniquely identifies a protocol amendment.

StudyAmendment.summary.defn: A short narrative representation describing the changes introduced in the current version of the protocol.

StudyAmendmentImpact.isSubstantial.defn: An indication as to whether the study amendment's impact on the study is substantial.

StudyAmendmentImpact.text.defn: An instance of unstructured text that represents the study amendment impact.

StudyAmendmentReason.otherReason.defn: The rationale for the change(s) to, or formal clarification of, a protocol that is not otherwise specified.

StudyArm.dataOriginDescription.defn: The textual representation of the study arm data origin.

StudyArm.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study arm.

StudyArm.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study arm.

StudyArm.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study arm.

StudyChange.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study change.

StudyChange.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study change.

StudyChange.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study change.

StudyChange.rationale.defn: An explanation as to the logical reasons for why a study change has occurred.

StudyChange.summary.defn: A short narrative representation describing the changes introduced in the current version of the study.

StudyCohort.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study cohort.

StudyCohort.includesHealthySubjects.defn: An indication as to whether the study cohort includes healthy subjects, that is, subjects without the disease or condition under study.
StudyCohort.includesHealthySubjects.pref: Study Cohort Includes Healthy Subjects Indicator

StudyCohort.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study cohort.

StudyCohort.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study cohort.

StudyDefinitionDocument.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study definition document.

StudyDefinitionDocument.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study definition document.

StudyDefinitionDocument.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study definition document.

StudyDefinitionDocument.templateName.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study definition document template.

StudyDefinitionDocumentVersion.version.defn: A sequence of characters used to identify the version of the study definition document.

StudyDesign.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study design.

StudyDesign.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study design.

StudyDesign.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study design.

StudyDesign.rationale.defn: Reason(s) for choosing the study design. This may include reasons for the choice of control or comparator, as well as the scientific rationale for the study design.

StudyDesignPopulation.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study design population.

StudyDesignPopulation.includesHealthySub.defn: An indication as to whether the study design population includes healthy subjects, that is, subjects without the disease or condition under study.
StudyDesignPopulation.includesHealthySub.pref: Study Design Population Includes Healthy Subjects Indicator

StudyDesignPopulation.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study design population.

StudyDesignPopulation.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study design population.

StudyElement.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study design element.

StudyElement.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study design element.

StudyElement.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study design element.

StudyEpoch.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study epoch.

StudyEpoch.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study epoch.

StudyEpoch.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study epoch, i.e., the named time period defined in the protocol, wherein a study activity is specified and unchanging throughout the interval, to support a study-specific purpose.

StudyIdentifier.text.defn: An instance of structured text that represents the study identifier.

StudyIntervention.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study intervention.

StudyIntervention.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study intervention.

StudyIntervention.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study intervention.

StudyRole.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study role.

StudyRole.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study role.

StudyRole.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study role.

StudySite.description.defn: A narrative representation of the study site.

StudySite.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the study site.

StudySite.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study site.

StudyTitle.text.defn: An instance of unstructured text that represents the study title.

StudyVersion.rationale.defn: A statement describing the overall rationale of the study. This field describes the contribution of this study to product development, i.e., what knowledge is being contributed from the conduct of this study.

StudyVersion.versionIdentifier.defn: A sequence of characters used to identify, name, or characterize the study version.

SubjectEnrollment.description.defn: A narrative representation of the subject enrollment.

SubjectEnrollment.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the subject enrollment..

SubjectEnrollment.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the subject enrollment.

Substance.description.defn: A narrative representation of the substance.

Substance.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the substance.

Substance.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the substance.

SyntaxTemplate.description.defn: A narrative representation of the syntax template.

SyntaxTemplate.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the syntax template.

SyntaxTemplate.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the syntax template.

SyntaxTemplate.text.defn: A structured text string containing prescribed text interspersed with user-defined parameter values.

SyntaxTemplateDictionary.description.defn: A narrative representation of the syntax template dictionary.

SyntaxTemplateDictionary.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the syntax template dictionary.

SyntaxTemplateDictionary.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the syntax template dictionary.

Timing.description.defn: A narrative representation of the chronological relationship between temporal events.

Timing.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the timing.

Timing.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the timing.

Timing.value.defn: The temporal value of the chronological relationship between temporal events.

Timing.valueLabel.defn: The short descriptive designation for the timing value.

Timing.windowLabel.defn: The short descriptive designation for a time period, or other type of interval, during which a temporal event may be achieved, obtained, or observed.

Timing.windowLower.defn: The earliest chronological value of an allowable period of time during which a temporal event takes place.

Timing.windowUpper.defn: The latest chronological value of an allowable period of time during which a temporal event takes place.

TransitionRule.description.defn: A narrative representation of the transition rule.

TransitionRule.label.defn: The short descriptive designation for the transition rule.

TransitionRule.name.defn: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the transition rule.

TransitionRule.text.defn: An instance of unstructured text that represents the transition rule.

Abbreviation.defn: A set of letters that are drawn from a word or from a sequence of words and that are used for brevity in place of the full word or phrase. (CDISC Glossary)

Activity.defn: An action, undertaking, or event, which is anticipated to be performed or observed, or was performed or observed, according to the study protocol during the execution of the study.

Address.defn: A standardized representation of the location of a person, business, building, or organization. (NCI)

AdministrableProduct.defn: Any study product that is formulated and presented in the form that is suitable for administration to a study participant.

AdministrableProductIdentifier.defn: A sequence of characters used to identify, name, or characterize the administrable product.

AdministrableProductProperty.defn: A characteristic from a set of characteristics used to define an administrable product.

Administration.defn: The act of dispensing, applying, or tendering a product, agent, or therapy.

AliasCode.defn: An alternative symbol or combination of symbols which is assigned to the members of a collection.

AnalysisPopulation.defn: A target study population on which an analysis is performed. These may be represented by the entire study population, a subgroup defined by a particular characteristic measured at baseline, or a principal stratum defined by the occurrence (or non-occurrence, depending on context) of a specific intercurrent event. (ICH E9 R1 Addendum)

AssignedPerson.defn: An individual person who is allotted or appointed to a particular role, function, or other entity.

BiomedicalConcept.defn: A unit of biomedical knowledge created from a unique combination of characteristics that include implementation details like variables and terminologies, used as building blocks for standardized, hierarchically structured clinical research information.

BiomedicalConceptCategory.defn: A grouping of biomedical concepts based on some commonality or by user defined characteristics.

BiomedicalConceptProperty.defn: A characteristic from a set of characteristics used to define a biomedical concept.

BiomedicalConceptSurrogate.defn: A concept that substitutes for a standard biomedical concept from the designated source.

BiospecimenRetention.defn: The continued possession, cataloging, and storage of collected biological specimens beyond their initial use.

Characteristic.defn: The distinguishing qualities or prominent aspects of an entity.

Code.defn: A symbol or combination of symbols which is assigned to the members of a collection.

CommentAnnotation.defn: An explanatory or critical comment, or other in-context information (e.g., pattern, motif, link), that has been associated with data or other types of information.

ConditionAssignment.defn: An allotting or appointment to a condition or set of conditions that are to be met in order to make a logical decision.

DocumentContentReference.defn: A citation pointing to the location of specific content within a document.

Duration.defn: The length of time during which something continues.

EligibilityCriterion.defn: Characteristics which are necessary to allow a subject to participate in a clinical study, as outlined in the study protocol. The concept covers inclusion and exclusion criteria.

EligibilityCriterionItem.defn: An individual item within the container that holds an instance of an eligibility criterion.

Encounter.defn: Any physical or virtual contact between two or more parties involved in a study, at which an assessment or activity takes place.

Endpoint.defn: A defined variable intended to reflect an outcome of interest that is statistically analyzed to address a particular research question. NOTE: A precise definition of an endpoint typically specifies the type of assessments made, the timing of those assessments, the assessment tools used, and possibly other details, as applicable, such as how multiple assessments within an individual are to be combined. [After BEST Resource] (CDISC Glossary)

Estimand.defn: A precise description of the treatment effect reflecting the clinical question posed by a given clinical trial objective. It summarises at a population level what the outcomes would be in the same patients under different treatment conditions being compared. (ICH E9 R1 Addendum)

GeographicScope.defn: The extent or range related to the physical location of an entity.

GovernanceDate.defn: Any of the dates associated with event milestones within a clinical study's oversight and management framework.

Identifier.defn: One or more characters used to identify, name, or characterize the nature, properties, or contents of a thing.

Indication.defn: The disease or condition the intervention will diagnose, treat, prevent, cure, or mitigate.

Ingredient.defn: Any component that constitutes a part of a compounded substance or mixture.

IntercurrentEvent.defn: An event(s) occurring after treatment initiation that affects either the interpretation or the existence of the measurements associated with the clinical question of interest. (ICH E9 Addendum on Estimands)

InterventionalStudyDesign.defn: The strategy that specifies the structure of an interventional trial in terms of the planned activities (including timing) and statistical analysis approach intended to meet the objectives of the study.

Masking.defn: The mechanism used to obscure the distinctive characteristics of the study intervention or procedure to make it indistinguishable from a comparator. (CDISC Glossary)

MedicalDevice.defn: Any instrument, apparatus, implement, machine, appliance, implant, reagent for in vitro use, software, material or other similar or related article, intended by the manufacturer to be used, alone or in combination for, one or more specific medical purpose(s). [After REGULATION (EU) 2017/745 OF THE EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL of 5 April 2017 on medical devices]

MedicalDeviceIdentifier.defn: A sequence of characters used to identify, name, or characterize the medical device.

NarrativeContent.defn: The container that holds an instance of unstructured text and which may include objects such as tables, figures, and images.

NarrativeContentItem.defn: An individual item within the container that holds an instance of unstructured text and which may include objects such as tables, figures, and images.

Objective.defn: The reason for performing a study in terms of the scientific questions to be answered by the analysis of data collected during the study.

ObservationalStudyDesign.defn: The strategy that specifies the structure of an observational study in terms of the planned activities (including timing) and statistical analysis approach intended to meet the objectives of the study.

Organization.defn: A formalized group of persons or other organizations collected together for a common purpose (such as administrative, legal, political) and the infrastructure to carry out that purpose. (BRIDG)

ParameterMap.defn: The paired name and value for a given parameter.

PersonName.defn: A word or group of words indicating the identity of a person usually consisting of a first (personal) name and a last (family) name with an optional middle name. In some cultural traditions the family name comes first.

PopulationDefinition.defn: A concise explanation of the meaning of a population.

Procedure.defn: Any activity performed by manual and/or instrumental means for the purpose of diagnosis, assessment, therapy, prevention, or palliative care.

ProductOrganizationRole.defn: A designation that identifies the function of an organization within the context of the product.

Quantity.defn: How much there is of something that can be measured; the total amount or number.

QuantityRange.defn: The total amount (number), or the limits (minimum and maximum) of a variation.

Range.defn: An expression that defines the lower and upper limits of a variation.

ReferenceIdentifier.defn: A sequence of characters used to identify, name, or characterize the reference.

ResponseCode.defn: A symbol or combination of symbols representing the response to the question.

ScheduleTimeline.defn: A chronological schedule of planned temporal events.

ScheduleTimelineExit.defn: To go out of or leave the schedule timeline.

ScheduledActivityInstance.defn: A scheduled occurrence of an activity event.

ScheduledDecisionInstance.defn: A scheduled occurrence of a decision event.

ScheduledInstance.defn: A scheduled occurrence of a temporal event.

Strength.defn: The content of an substance expressed quantitatively per dosage unit, per unit of volume, or per unit of weight, according to the pharmaceutical dose form of the product.

Study.defn: A clinical study involves research using human volunteers (also called participants) that is intended to add to medical knowledge. There are two main types of clinical studies: clinical trials (also called interventional studies) and observational studies. (CDISC Glossary)

StudyAmendment.defn: A written description of a change(s) to, or formal clarification of, a study.

StudyAmendmentImpact.defn: The effect or consequence of an amendment on some aspect of the study.

StudyAmendmentReason.defn: The rationale for the change(s) to, or formal clarification of, a protocol.

StudyArm.defn: A planned pathway assigned to the subject as they progress through the study, usually referred to by a name that reflects one or more treatments, exposures, and/or controls included in the path.

StudyCell.defn: A partitioning of a study arm into individual pieces, which are associated with an epoch and any number of sequential elements within that epoch.

StudyChange.defn: The act of alteration or modification to a study.

StudyCohort.defn: A group of individuals who share a set of characteristics (e.g., exposures, experiences, attributes), which logically defines a population under study.

StudyDefinitionDocument.defn: Any physical or electronic document that is related to defining a study or part of a study.

StudyDefinitionDocumentVersion.defn: A representation of a particular edition or snapshot of the study definition document as it exists at a particular point in time.

StudyDesign.defn: A plan detailing how a study will be performed in order to represent the phenomenon under examination, to answer the research questions that have been asked, and informing the statistical approach.

StudyDesignPopulation.defn: The population within the general population to which the study results can be generalized.

StudyElement.defn: A basic building block for time within a clinical study comprising the following characteristics: a description of what happens to the subject during the element; a definition of the start of the element; a rule for ending the element.

StudyEpoch.defn: A named time period defined in the protocol, wherein a study activity is specified and unchanging throughout the interval, to support a study-specific purpose.

StudyIdentifier.defn: A sequence of characters used to identify, name, or characterize the study.

StudyIntervention.defn: Any agent, device, or procedure being tested or used as a reference or comparator in the conduct of a clinical trial.

StudyRole.defn: A designation that identifies the function of study personnel or an organization within the context of the study.

StudySite.defn: The location at which a study investigator conducts study activities.

StudyTitle.defn: The sponsor-defined name of the clinical study.

StudyVersion.defn: A plan at a particular point in time for a study.

SubjectEnrollment.defn: The act of enrolling subjects into a study. The subject will have met the inclusion/exclusion criteria to participate in the trial and will have signed an informed consent form. (CDISC Glossary)

Substance.defn: Any matter of defined composition that has discrete existence, whose origin may be biological, mineral or chemical.

SyntaxTemplate.defn: A standardized pattern used for the arrangement of words and phrases to create well-formed, structured sentences.

SyntaxTemplateDictionary.defn: A reference source that provides a listing of valid parameter names and values used in syntax template text strings.

Timing.defn: The chronological relationship between temporal events.

TransitionRule.defn: A guide that governs the allocation of subjects to operational options at a discrete decision point or branch (e.g., assignment to a particular arm, discontinuation) within a clinical trial plan.
